line: CREATE DOMAIN positive_amount AS NUMERIC(14, 2) CHECK (VALUE >= 0.00);
team_id BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
region CHAR(2) DEFAULT 'EU', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
CHECK (ends_on IS NULL OR ends_on >= starts_on)
task_id INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
parent_id INTEGER, title TEXT NOT NULL,
ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE,
ADD COLUMN owner_name TEXT, ALTER COLUMN title SET STORAGE EXTENDED;
COMMENT ON COLUMN task.payload IS 'Opaque bytes; may begin with \x00';
INSERT INTO project (project_id, team_id, code, budget, metadata, starts_on)
INSERT INTO task (project_id, title, state, estimate, tags, score)

line: USING task AS source ON target.task_id = source.task_id
WHEN MATCHED AND source.updated_at > target.updated_at THEN
UPDATE SET title = source.title, state = source.state
-- CTEs, recursion, windows, FILTER, and set operations ---------------------
SELECT t.task_id, t.parent_id, t.title, 0 AS depth,
FROM task AS t WHERE t.parent_id IS NULL
count(*) FILTER (WHERE depth > 1) OVER () AS deep_count,
PARTITION BY parent_id ORDER BY depth, task_id
ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
SELECT depth, ordinal, title, previous_title, deep_count
ORDER BY depth NULLS LAST, ordinal
-- Joins, subqueries, grouping, CASE, casts, and operators ------------------
FROM unnest(ARRAY[1, 3, 2]) AS x(value)) AS local_max,
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE t.state IS DISTINCT FROM 'done') AS open_count
FULL JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT project_id FROM task) AS seen
OR p.project_id IN (SELECT project_id FROM task WHERE score >= 0x10)
GROUP BY p.project_id, p.code, p.budget, p.metadata, stats.open_count
SELECT CAST('NaN' AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS not_a_number,
X'CAFE' AS hex_bytes, TRUE AND NOT FALSE AS logic_value,
-- Transactions, prepared statements, views, and indexes -------------------
BEGIN TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL REPEATABLE READ READ WRITE;
UPDATE project SET budget = budget * 1.05 WHERE active;
LEFT JOIN task AS t ON t.project_id = p.project_id
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS project_code_lower_idx
-- PostgreSQL procedural bodies and multiline dollar-quoted state ----------
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION bump_task_score(p_task_id integer, p_delta numeric)
RETURNS numeric LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY INVOKER
RAISE EXCEPTION 'negative score for task %', p_task_id
PERFORM 1 FROM task WHERE title LIKE '%𝌆%';
/* Dollar bodies may contain semicolons and quote marks: ';' and "x". */
-- Administration and a deliberately calm, fully closed EOF ----------------
GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON task TO PUBLIC;
REVOKE UPDATE (payload) ON task FROM PUBLIC;
